meaning: n.连环图画,报上登载连环图画的版面
examples: Interesting tidbits, videos and funnies from all over the world.
Starting today I refuse to read the funnies till I hear from you.
Marian's brother-in-law read the English page, as dedicated as a nice little boy reading the funnies.
Here are a couple of our favourite funnies to get the ball rolling...
The first two were called Folklore and Fairytale Funnies, published in 2000, Strange Stories for Strange Kids, released the following year.
